title: erysimum spathulatum
intro: Erysimum spathulatum, also known as Siskiyou wallflower, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Siskiyou Mountains in California and Oregon. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erysimum spathulatum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain, and fight off infections. Erysimum spathulatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
